title: gossypium hirsutum f. schottii
intro: Gossypium hirsutum f. schottii, also known as American upland cotton or Schott's cotton, is a subspecies of the cotton plant that is native to the Americas. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Gossypium hirsutum f. schottii include wound healing, pain relief, and the reduction of fever, making it a valuable plant for traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, salve, or infusion, and is often used in folk medicine to treat a range of ailments.
